subject: Young humanoid fighter with light hair wielding a large sword, surrounded by blue energy
description: A young male-presenting humanoid with light-colored hair stands mid-action, holding a large broad sword in front of them. The outfit is dark — dark jacket, light shirt underneath. Blue and white energy crackles around the blade and the figure's body. The background is similarly electric, with blue lightning-like energy patterns. The composition is dynamic, suggesting rapid movement or a powered slash.
foreground: Young fighter with light hair, dark outfit, large sword with blue energy
background: Blue and white electric energy field
